<html xmlns:o='urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office' xmlns:w='urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:word' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-html40'><head><meta charset='utf-8'><title>JPG to Word</title><style> * {box-sizing: border-box;} body {font-family: Arial, sans-serif;} .image-container {text-align: center;margin-top: 100px;} </style></head><body>
          <div class="image-container">
            <h3>Image 1</h3>
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="600" height="1333">
          </div></body></html>
